headlines.headline: Frelex Outlets revises long-term strategy with focus on renewable storage

headlines.headline: Dralol Computing reports rising costs pressuring margins in digital payments

headlines.headline: Xovol Goods secures $320M contract with a global retailer

sentiment.reasoning: A major contract win with a global retailer is a significant positive event that will drive revenue growth over the coming months.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
